title: Install and Set Up kubectl on macOS — Uninstall kubectl on macOS
text:
Depending on how you installed
kubectl
, use one of the following methods.

Locate the
kubectl
binary on your system:
which kubectl
Remove the
kubectl
binary:
sudo rm <path>
Replace
<path>
with the path to the
kubectl
binary from the previous step. For example,
sudo rm /usr/local/bin/kubectl
.
Locate the
kubectl
binary on your system:
which kubectl
Remove the
kubectl
binary:
sudo rm <path>
Replace
<path>
with the path to the
kubectl
binary from the previous step. For example,
sudo rm /usr/local/bin/kubectl
.
